headline: Microsoft’s New AI Alliances Reframe Patent, Security And Enterprise Growth Story

The company is also leading Project Glasswing, a joint cybersecurity initiative with other major technology players to secure software supply chains in the age of advanced AI models. Microsoft has expanded its partnership with Publicis Groupe to deploy an end to end, agentic AI driven marketing stack across global operations...

Hard to believe, but Alphabet’s stock is up more than 4x Microsoft’s stock. headline: 3 Software Stocks Citi Just Downgraded as Slump Refuses to Let Up
summary: As first-quarter earnings loom “amidst parabolic AI revenue inflections at foundational model leaders,”  Citi  Research analysts expect the concerns around the durability of business models for software-as-a-service companies to intensify in the months ahead.  The rating readjustment reflects Citi’s house view on software.  From their perspective, “investors will struggle to get comfortable with the sector at large” until they see more meaningful growth acceleration, more clarity on focus areas of developers like OpenAI and Anthropic as they creep into the enterprise software market.

headline: While Amazon, Microsoft, Google Struggle With AI On Land — China Looks To The Sea
summary: The AI race is running into an unexpected wall—and it's not chips or capital. It's water, power, and local resistance. As Amazon.com, Inc., Microsoft Corporation, and Alphabet Inc. push to expand data center capacity, investors are starting to question whether the physical footprint of AI is becoming the real constraint.
